tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij zdania, wstawiając wyrazy podane w nawiasach w odpowiedniej formie. Wymagana jest pełna poprawność gramatyczna i ortograficzna odpowiedzi.

items.context: By the time we _________ (arrive), the film _________ (already / start).
Look at those clouds! I think it _________ (rain) soon, so we _________ (not go) to the park.
While my brother _________ (do) his homework, the lights suddenly _________ (go) out.
I _________ (know) Sophie since 2019, but I _________ (not see) her last month.
This time next week we _________ (lie) on a beach, because our holiday _________ (begin) on Saturday.
She was tired because she _________ (work) all day, and she still _________ (not finish) the report.
